title: Reshinify by SirHoka
description: Retextures various cobblemon that were cursed with horrible shinies. If GamеFrеak won't fix them, then I will.
body:
![Make that copper BURNN](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d295b52ba779f6d1435fd53a60dd23633a66ce58_0.webp)

I made this pack to refresh the shiny look of some pokemon who's shinies were simply... underwhelming. I mean come on, they're SHINY, rare, exotic, special and yada yada.... 

So here I try to make them actually feel special :)

(Small note, I simply retexture the shinies of the models that cobblemon team provide themself, so I have no claim over anything BUT the coloring.)


**Currently redone shinies:**

- Gengar line
- Garchomp line
- Raichu line
- Pidgeot line
- Charcadet line
- Infernape line
- Skeledirge line
- 
- [I can finally tell they're SHININ' :D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ecdb0f77651be213208a2e015eb7a0a6590dd3f_0.webp)
